description: Configure an auto-reply for the 'IT Support' mailbox. The auto-reply must use the subject 'We've received your request - IT Support' and the message body must include an acknowledgment that the request will be reviewed 'within 24 hours', a notice about scheduled maintenance on 'December 14-15', and the emergency contact number '(555) 987-6543'.

metadata.expected_subject: We've received your request - IT Support
